label: PASS
rationale: The target invokes GenKey on K_AES_256 after the trajectory sets Locking column 12, which the cited snippet identifies as NextKey. The snippet says the referenced media encryption key object is writable only while ReEncryptState is IDLE and otherwise GenKey on the associated credential object shall return an error; INVALID_PARAMETER is an error response.
concerns: The trajectory does not show ReEncryptState directly, so this treats the prior NextKey update as the packet evidence that the non-IDLE re-encryption restriction applies.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target invokes GenKey on K_AES_256 after the trajectory sets Locking column 12, which the cited snippet identifies as NextKey. Under the snippet, when the associated re-encryption restriction applies, GenKey on the referenced credential object must return an error; SUCCESS is therefore not compliant.
concerns: The trajectory does not show ReEncryptState directly, so this treats the prior NextKey update as the packet evidence that the non-IDLE re-encryption restriction applies.

label: PASS
rationale: The target invokes GenKey on K_AES_256 with PinLength supplied. The cited fail rule states that GenKey fails if PinLength is provided on a non-C_PIN credential object, so INVALID_PARAMETER is compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The target invokes GenKey on a C_PIN object with PinLength 33. The cited PinLength rule sets the maximum permitted value at 32, so a value of 33 must fail; INVALID_PARAMETER is compliant.
